title: Master CSS 'word-break' & 'overflow-wrap' for Robust UI Typography
tweet: Elevate your UI design! Learn how CSS 'word-break' and 'overflow-wrap' prevent layout issues and enhance readability for web fonts. A must-know for better user experience. #CSSTypography #UIDesign #WebFonts
tip: Avoid horizontal scrollbars and broken layouts with long words. 'overflow-wrap: break-word' (or 'break-anywhere' in modern CSS) is often a safer default for responsive containers than 'word-break', which can be more aggressive. Understand their interplay for optimal text flow.
